'''Grindol Maal''' was an ex-[[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] with [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] sympathies.

==Biography==
Maal was a close friend with the [[Revwien/Legends|Revwien]] [[Wuwuhuul]]. Together, they volunteered to aid the Rebellion on a mission to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Goratak III]]. The Rebellion was trying to capture a [[I2-CG droid/Legends|I2-CG]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] that had crashed on the planet. The droid contained highly sensitive information on a Rebel [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] manufacturing plant on [[Tar Morden]].

Maal was joined by the [[Red Smoke]], [[Safari One]] and [[Buzz Boys]] squads. The 30 troops in total fought against 15 Imperial troops and a group of [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] led by [[Feskitt Bobb]]. They clashed in the middle of a [[Crystal Forests|crystal forest]], with the outcome of the [[Mission to Goratak III|battle]] unknown.

Maal was always eager to fight against the Empire, and was often armed with a [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]] and a [[Vibrocutlass/Legends|vibrocutlass]].
